task_title: Test parse_watched_repos pipe-separated parsing and !manual flag

phase_history.output:
All 20 tests pass. Here's what was added to `config.rs` as a `#[cfg(test)]` module (private function access, no test infrastructure needed):

| Test | What it covers |
|------|---------------|
| `empty_watched_returns_only_primary` | Empty `watched_raw` → only primary repo with `is_self=true` |
| `empty_pipeline_repo_and_empty_watched_returns_empty` | Both empty → empty vec |
| `empty_pipeline_repo_with_watched_entry` | No primary when `pipeline_repo=""` |
| `single_entry_path_only` | 1-field entry: defaults for all optional fields |
| `entry_with_two_fields_captures_test_cmd` | 2 fields: path + test_cmd |
| `entry_with_four_fields_captures_mode` | 4 fields: mode captured, lint_cmd="" |
| `entry_with_five_fields_captures_lint_cmd` | 5 fields: lint_cmd captured |
| `entry_with_six_fields_uses_slug_override` | 6th field used as repo_slug |
| `manual_suffix_sets_auto_merge_false_and_strips_suffix` | `test_cmd!manual` → `auto_merge=false`, suffix stripped |
| `manual_suffix_alone_strips_to_empty_test_cmd` | `!manual` alone → `test_cmd=""` |
| `no_manual_suffix_keeps_auto_merge_true` | No flag → `auto_merge=true` |
| `entry_matching_primary_repo_path_is_skipped` | Duplicate of primary path skipped |
| `multiple_pipe_separated_entries_all_parsed` | Three `|`-separated entries |
| `empty_segment_between_pipes_is_skipped` | `||` empty segment skipped |
| `whitespace_around_pipe_entries_is_trimmed` | Entry-level `trim()` works |
| `default_mode_is_sweborg_when_field_omitted` | Mode defaults to `"sweborg"` |
| `primary_repo_has_is_self_true_watched_has_false` | `is_self` set correctly |
| `primary_repo_inherits_pipeline_test_and_lint_cmd` | Primary inherits the two cmd args |
| `manual_flag_with_six_fields_and_slug_override` | `!manual` + slug_override together |
| `primary_repo_skipped_in_middle_of_pipe_list` | Skip even when not first in list |
